languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

languages.text: "С радостью подтверждаю протокол обмена священными регалиями и приветствую брата во служении." {n}В голосе Эоганна не слышно напряжения — скорее непонятный азарт.{/n} "Обеты, принятые в этом храме, мне известны, и я обещаю уважать их. Запрашиваю у досточтимого коллеги встречу для обмена знаниями и дискуссию о ценностях".

"It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

languages.text: 「聖器の交換の儀式の規定を確認し、また、弟の牧師と挨拶を交わすことを光栄に思います」{n}エオガンの声には緊張は感じられず、むしろ説明のつかない高揚感が漂っている。{/n}「この寺院で誓った誓いは、私にも知られています。私はそれを守ることを約束します。知識の交換を促進し、価値観について議論するために、尊敬する同僚との面会を申し出ます。」
languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

languages.text: "Es ist mir eine Freude, das Protokoll für den Austausch heiliger Insignien zu bestätigen und meinen Amtsbruder zu begrüßen." {n}In Eogunns Stimme ist keinerlei Anspannung spürbar ... eher eine unerklärliche Aufregung.{/n} "Die im Tempel abgelegten Eide sind mir bekannt und ich verspreche, sie zu ehren. Ich bitte um ein Treffen mit meinem geschätzten Kollegen, um Wissen auszutauschen und Werte zu diskutieren."
languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist mir eine Freude, das Protokoll für den Austausch heiliger Insignien zu bestätigen und meinen Amtsbruder zu begrüßen." {n}In Eo-ganns Stimme ist keinerlei Anspannung spürbar ... eher eine unerklärliche Aufregung.{/n} "Die im Tempel abgelegten Eide sind mir bekannt und ich verspreche, sie zu ehren. Ich bitte um ein Treffen mit meinem geschätzten Kollegen, um Wissen auszutauschen und Werte zu diskutieren."

languages.text: «Me congratula validar el protocolo de intercambio de formalidades litúrgicas y saludo a mi hermano en el sacerdocio». {n}No detectas ninguna tirantez en el tono de voz de Eogunn; más bien denota un inexplicable alborozo.{/n} «Conozco los votos que se profesan en este templo y prometo honrarlos. Solicito una reunión posterior con mi estimado colega a fin de intercambiar conocimientos y debatir sobre nuestros principios».
languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

traits.locale_text: «Me congratula validar el protocolo de intercambio de formalidades litúrgicas y saludo a mi hermano en el sacerdocio». {n}No detectas ninguna tirantez en el tono de voz de Eo-gann; más bien denota un inexplicable alborozo.{/n} «Conozco los votos que se profesan en este templo y prometo honrarlos. Solicito una reunión posterior con mi estimado colega a fin de intercambiar conocimientos y debatir sobre nuestros principios».

languages.text: "Kutsal alamet değişimi protokolünü onaylamaktan ve hizmetteki kardeşimi selamlamaktan zevk duyarım." {n}Eogunn'ın sesinde herhangi bir gerginlik sezilmiyor, aksine açıklanamaz bir heyecan var.{/n} "Bu tapınakta edilen yeminleri biliyorum ve onlara sadık kalacağıma söz veriyorum. İrfan alışverişini kolaylaştırmak ve değerleri tartışmak için saygıdeğer meslektaşımla bir toplantı talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal alamet değişimi protokolünü onaylamaktan ve hizmetteki kardeşimi selamlamaktan zevk duyarım." {n}Eo-gann'ın sesinde herhangi bir gerginlik sezilmiyor, aksine açıklanamaz bir heyecan var.{/n} "Bu tapınakta edilen yeminleri biliyorum ve onlara sadık kalacağıma söz veriyorum. İrfan alışverişini kolaylaştırmak ve değerleri tartışmak için saygıdeğer meslektaşımla bir toplantı talep ediyorum."

languages.text: « Je confirme avec plaisir le protocole d'échange de formalités sacrées et je salue mon frère de foi. » {n}Vous ne décelez aucune tension dans la voix d'Eogunn, mais plutôt une forme de fébrilité que vous ne vous expliquez pas.{/n} « Je suis bien au fait des vœux prononcés dans ce temple, et je promets de les honorer. Je sollicite une conversation avec mon estimé collègue afin de faciliter l'échange de connaissances et de débattre de nos valeurs. »
languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

Je sollicite une conversation avec mon estimé collègue afin de faciliter l'échange de connaissances et de débattre de nos valeurs. »

languages.text: “我乐于核准神圣圣物交换协议，并向我的神职兄弟致意。”{n}伊奥贡的嗓音中听不出丝毫紧张——反倒透着一种莫名的兴奋。{/n}“我知晓在此圣殿所立的誓言，并承诺恪守。我请求与尊敬的同僚会面，以促进知识交流和价值观的探讨。”
languages.original_text: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."

traits.locale_text: “我乐于核准神圣圣物交换协议，并向我的神职兄弟致意。”{n}埃欧-甘的嗓音中听不出丝毫紧张——反倒透着一种莫名的兴奋。{/n}“我知晓在此圣殿所立的誓言，并承诺恪守。我请求与尊敬的同僚会面，以促进知识交流和价值观的探讨。”
